case_title: CORALIE ELODIE THU-MAI TRAN VS. MANUKA CLARKE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAN, CORALIE ELODIE THU-MAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLARKE, MANUKA $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $845.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY TRAN, CORALIE ELODIE THU-MAI AS TO DEFENDANT CLARKE, MANUKA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-20-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF $65.00 FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED DEC-24-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CLARKE, MANUKA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
